hero.title: Investment Apartments and Residences in Miami
hero.subtitle: Invest in one of the most solid real estate markets in the United States. Miami combines rapid population growth, state tax advantages, and strong international demand in rentals and premium property purchases.
hero.badge: Up to +8–30% annual in prime areas

stats.text: Estimated gross returns in prime zones such as Brickell, Downtown, and Edgewater.
New residents (2020–2024). Florida leads domestic migration in the U.S., driving sustained demand.

about.title: Why Invest in Miami
about.description:
Miami is one of the most solid and attractive real estate markets in the U.S., combining sustained growth, legal certainty, and strong international demand.

Its economic dynamism and tax advantages position it as a strategic destination to protect and grow capital in USD.

market_card.title: REAL ESTATE MARKET
market_card.subtitle: High demand and legal certainty in USD

benefits.year_round_rentals: Tourism and active rental market year-round

why_choose.title: Why Investors Choose Miami
why_choose.description: Miami has established itself as one of the most dynamic and resilient real estate markets in the United States, driven by constant migration, financial growth, and sustained international demand.
benefits: Strategic selection in prime areas (Brickell, Downtown, Waterfront)
Profitability, appreciation, and liquidity analysis in USD
Full due diligence: developer, HOA, and legal structure
End-to-end support from acquisition to potential resale
why_choose.quote: Investing well is not luck. It is strategy.

buena_vista.title: Prime Location — Buena Vista, Miami
buena_vista.description: Located in one of Miami’s fastest-growing residential areas, this new construction combines modern architectural design, proximity to cultural hubs, and strong USD appreciation potential.
buena_vista.market_insight: Buena Vista benefits from the Design District expansion and the continued growth of Miami’s luxury urban corridor, driving sustained appreciation and strong executive rental demand.

aston_martin.title: Prime Location — Biscayne Boulevard Way
aston_martin.description: Set on one of the last waterfront parcels in Downtown Miami, Aston Martin Residences combines panoramic Biscayne Bay views, proximity to Brickell’s financial district, and direct access to the city’s top cultural and culinary hubs.
aston_martin.market_insight: Downtown Miami and Brickell continue to lead luxury market appreciation in South Florida, driven by high-net-worth migration, financial expansion, and international demand for premium waterfront assets.

ritz_carlton.title: South Beach, Miami
ritz_carlton.description: An ultra-exclusive boutique collection of just 30 oceanfront residences, where Ritz-Carlton heritage meets contemporary design and the iconic South Beach lifestyle.
features: Surrounded by Michelin restaurants, galleries, and culture
Immediate access to South Pointe, Sunset Harbour, and Ocean Drive
ritz_carlton.market_insight: Oceanfront branded residences in Miami Beach maintain a strong position in the luxury segment, with a high long-term wealth preservation component.

unit_types.title: Real Estate Investment Formats
unit_types.subtitle: Choose between different off-plan unit types in Miami based on profitability, timeline, and investment objective.

buena_vista.title: Buena Vista Modern Residence
buena_vista.description: Luxury residence with private pool and independent guest house, located minutes from the Design District.

aston_martin.title: Aston Martin Residences
aston_martin.description: Iconic waterfront residences in Downtown Miami, designed by the legendary British brand.

ritz_carlton.title: The Ritz-Carlton Residences
ritz_carlton.description: Oceanfront boutique collection in South Beach with VIP access to the Ritz-Carlton hotel.
